{"id":"205","sku":"EGCGBMYT002","name":"Myntra E-Gift Card","description":"
  • We live in a country that likes to celebrate its occasions by gifting.
  • If Diwali isn't fast approaching then your anniversary surely is.
  • We're forever bound by the challenge of 'how to top up last year's present?' This is where Pantaloons Gift cards make an entry – gifting should be a joy for the receiver as much as for the shopper.
  • You can gift them to your loved ones and be assured that they'll love treating themselves to their favourite things!
  • Our gift cards are the perfect gift to give. Mission surprise and delight, completed.
